title: Zhuangzi, Chapter 28: Giving Away a Throne
description: Chapter 28 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.
introduction: Chapter 28 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.

translation.text: Yao tried to give the empire to Xu You, but Xu You refused. He tried to give it to Zizhou Zhibo, but Zizhou Zhibo said, 'Make me Son of Heaven? Yes, that could perhaps be done. But I happen to suffer from a deep and serious illness which I am working to cure. I have no time to put the empire in order.'
